name: Physics Engine
description: A 3D rigid-body physics engine developed from scratch, focusing on low-level memory management and stable impulse-based collision resolution.

name: FinNews
description: News analysis and impact prediction system using a fine-tuned FinBERT Transformer model, modular data ingestion pipelines, and SQLite for data integrity.

name: SurveyLens
description: AI-driven survey analyzer with a dynamic FastAPI backend orchestrating statistical workflows and an AI Orchestrator using the Gemini API for data profiling and summary generation.
